title: Hash-lock RepoBrief semantic extension dependencies
goal: Define supported platforms and create a complete reproducible hash lock plus installation evidence for the optional sentence-transformers and Torch dependency closure without moving semantic reranking into RepoBrief core by default.

acceptance.assertion: Supported Python, operating-system and architecture targets for the semantic extension are explicit; unsupported targets fail closed or remain clearly excluded.
acceptance.verifier: Versioned contract, tests and installation evidence

acceptance.assertion: The full sentence-transformers and Torch transitive closure is exactly versioned and SHA-256 locked for each supported target.
acceptance.verifier: Generated lock files, deterministic regeneration and isolated --require-hashes installs

acceptance.assertion: Semantic dependencies remain optional and do not become an implicit RepoBrief core, snapshot-read or default-ranking dependency.
acceptance.verifier: Diff review, boundary tests and release policy

acceptance.assertion: The evidence does not claim semantic quality, cross-platform completeness, vulnerability absence or default-promotion readiness.
